name: bgs-modding-superpowers
description: Agentic superpowers for Bethesda Game Studio modpack curation: MCP-driven xEdit conflict audit, MO2 control plane, and runtime install/dev-log skills.

interface.shortDescription: Curate Bethesda modpacks with MO2 + xEdit superpowers
interface.longDescription: Agentic toolkit for Bethesda Game Studio modpack builders. Bundles an xEdit conflict-audit MCP, an MO2 control-plane plugin installer, and skills for first-time setup, dev-log maintenance, and release-changelog generation.
defaultPrompt: Help me set up a new Bethesda modpack project.
Audit conflicts across my current load order.
Start a dev-log for my modpack project.
